## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss calendar management, email organization, and general work updates.](https://fathom.video/share/FfV1Gnfoy_sLL88bHt1oCXxmaygkmUg8?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Mondays: Morning for focused work, afternoons for meetings](https://fathom.video/share/FfV1Gnfoy_sLL88bHt1oCXxmaygkmUg8?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [Tuesdays: Packed with team meetings and important calls](https://fathom.video/share/FfV1Gnfoy_sLL88bHt1oCXxmaygkmUg8?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [Thursdays: More open for ad-hoc meetings](https://fathom.video/share/FfV1Gnfoy_sLL88bHt1oCXxmaygkmUg8?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [Fridays: Workshops/events often scheduled](https://fathom.video/share/FfV1Gnfoy_sLL88bHt1oCXxmaygkmUg8?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [Implement more aggressive email unsubscribing](https://fathom.video/share/FfV1Gnfoy_sLL88bHt1oCXxmaygkmUg8?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)
  - [Create rules to filter subscriptions/notifications out of inbox](https://fathom.video/share/FfV1Gnfoy_sLL88bHt1oCXxmaygkmUg8?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)

## Topics

### Calendar Management

  - [Alternate weekly meetings between Jose/Sam](https://fathom.video/share/FfV1Gnfoy_sLL88bHt1oCXxmaygkmUg8?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [Keep Josh's meetings weekly](https://fathom.video/share/FfV1Gnfoy_sLL88bHt1oCXxmaygkmUg8?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [Block out time for upcoming workshops/events](https://fathom.video/share/FfV1Gnfoy_sLL88bHt1oCXxmaygkmUg8?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [Open up more availability on Mondays/Thursdays](https://fathom.video/share/FfV1Gnfoy_sLL88bHt1oCXxmaygkmUg8?tab=summary&timestamp=731.0)
  - [Coordinate external calendar visibility](https://fathom.video/share/FfV1Gnfoy_sLL88bHt1oCXxmaygkmUg8?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)

### Email Organization

  - [Create folders for newsletters, potential unsubscribes](https://fathom.video/share/FfV1Gnfoy_sLL88bHt1oCXxmaygkmUg8?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)
  - [Set up rules to filter notifications out of inbox](https://fathom.video/share/FfV1Gnfoy_sLL88bHt1oCXxmaygkmUg8?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)
  - [Be aggressive about unsubscribing from irrelevant emails](https://fathom.video/share/FfV1Gnfoy_sLL88bHt1oCXxmaygkmUg8?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
